column1: Ketel Marte headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a rock-solid 71.9% hit probability, batting leadoff at home for Arizona and flashing a switch-hitting edge against Parker Messick. The steady bat and top-of-order role, paired with a favorable park and clear platoon advantage, make Marte a prime target for streakers. Chandler Simpson isn’t far behind, also leading off and enjoying a lefty-vs-righty matchup on the road for Atlanta—his reliable profile and consistent contact rate keep him firmly in the mix. For those looking to round out their card, Colt Keith and Mickey Moniak both offer strong platoon spots and top-of-lineup opportunities in hitter-friendly parks.
